entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a cool-season legume affected by heat-stress at the reproductive stage

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by high temperatures, particularly during the reproductive stage

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain productivity and growth under heat-stress conditions

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with a quantitative trait, such as heat tolerance

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved plant varieties

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of 292 F8-9 lines developed from a cross between heat sensitive and heat tolerant parents

entities.name: ICC 4567
entities.description: A heat sensitive chickpea line used as a parent for RIL development

entities.name: ICC 15614
entities.description: A heat tolerant chickpea line used as a parent for RIL development

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring physical traits of the RILs in different environments

entities.name: LATE SOWN
entities.description: An environment simulating heat-stress

entities.name: NORMAL SOWN
entities.description: A non-stress environment

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A map spanning 529.11 cM constructed using SNP markers

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to identify single nucleotide polymorphism markers

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM MARKERS
entities.description: 271 markers used for the construction of the genetic map

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: An analysis method used to identify genomic regions harbouring QTLs

entities.name: CALG05
entities.description: A genomic region/linkage group harbouring four major QTLs for heat tolerance

entities.name: CALG06
entities.description: A genomic region/linkage group harbouring QTLs for heat tolerance

entities.name: NUMBER OF FILLED PODS PER PLOT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait associated with heat tolerance located on CaLG05

entities.name: TOTAL NUMBER OF SEEDS PER PLOT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait associated with heat tolerance located on CaLG05

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLOT
entities.description: A phenotypic trait associated with heat tolerance located on CaLG05

entities.name: PERCENT POD SETTING
entities.description: A phenotypic trait associated with heat tolerance located on CaLG05

entities.name: EPISTATIC QTLS
entities.description: Pairs of QTLs showing significant epistatic effects

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A trait showing significant QTL x environment interaction

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: A trait showing significant QTL x environment interaction

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: 25 putative genes identified for heat-stress response in major genomic regions

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using markers linked to QTLs to facilitate the development of heat tolerant varieties
